title: Grass To String
description: A simple mod which adds a easy way to convert grass into string
body:
My First Ever Mod =D

Ever Got tired of having to wait for night time to get string for backpacks? well not anymore!
This mods adds a simplistic way of getting string from grass. How? Just punch the grass and smelt the drops!

This mod adds 2 things
**Plant fiber**
A new item you get from punching grass or tall grass. It also serves as a very mediocre food source, filling up half a hunger bar.
**Dried Grass**
You get from smelting Plant Fiber in a smoker. It has only 1 purpose which is to be smelted in a smoker again to get string!
